arts.ttl: Man City Plot to Edge Barcelona, PSG for Bayern Munich Veteran on €20M-a-Year Wages

As the January transfer window approaches, one Premier League club could be making a move for the veteran to help stop their free fall. arts.ttl: PSG extend lead at the top with win over Lyon
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain claimed a 3-1 home win over Lyon with early goals from Ousmane Dembélé and Vitinha plus a late strike from Gonçalo Ramos on Sunday.

Among the players that the Ligue 1 McDonald’s leaders are connected to is Sporting Lisbon’s Viktor Gyökeres. arts.ttl: Video: Lyon’s Lucas Perri Makes Blunder, Gonçalo Ramos Scores for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain added a third goal late in the contest against Olympique Lyonnais on Sunday night at the Parc des Princes. The Ligue 1 McDonald’s leaders opened the scoring with two goals in less than 15 minutes, but the boots went quiet afterward. arts.ttl: Neymar Jr ‘very happy’ after swapping PSG for Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle on Alert as PSG Willing to Move off From €30M-Rated Flop
